calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jan-16-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bruce Nguyen, T:714.353.2961, defendant/claimant appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: DEFENDANT BRUCE NGUYEN'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is DENIED. The Court examined defendant Bruce Nguyen as to his ability to pay the judgment and ordered that the levying officer shall withhold $150.00 per pay period from Mr. Nguyen as payment for the judgment.

ORDER SIGNED after hearing. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-16-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is off calendar. Duplicate entry. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
